text:
RepoPulse forecast (7-day breakout watchlist)

Method: reproducible baseline model using public GitHub signals (no LLM).
Breakout = +max(200 stars, +50%) within 7 days.

1) zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw | 97% | stars now 20144 → est 34053 (range 33967-34139)
   https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
2) cloudflare/vinext | 96% | stars now 4132 → est 16774 (range 16749-16799)
   https://github.com/cloudflare/vinext
3) RightNow-AI/openfang | 95% | stars now 2597 → est 13024 (range 12999-13049)
   https://github.com/RightNow-AI/openfang
4) Panniantong/Agent-Reach | 95% | stars now 2093 → est 8223 (range 8198-8248)
   https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach
5) AlexsJones/llmfit | 94% | stars now 5853 → est 10626 (range 10579-10673)
   https://github.com/AlexsJones/llmfit

Daily forecasts are logged publicly, then scored 7 days later (hits, misses, calibration).
#opensource #software #datascience #forecasting #github
